item.title: 嗨，我需要星星 | Hi I need Stars
item.description:
一旦被暂停，桑蒂玛斯将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到其暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，桑蒂玛斯将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，santimars 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己才能访问。

如果 santimars 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从仪表板重新发布帖子。

笔记：

感谢您保证 DEV 社区的安全。 您可以执行以下操作来标记 santimars：

使 santimars 的所有帖子不那么明显

举报其他不当行为

不加标记的 santimars 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Once suspended, santimars will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, santimars will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by santimars will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If santimars is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag santimars:

Make all posts by santimars less visible

santimars consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging santimars will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: santimars

item.title: 克服酒精成瘾：有效治疗的综合指南 | OvercomingOvercoming Alcohol Addiction: A Comprehensive Guide to Effective Treatment
item.description:
酒精成瘾是一个无情的敌人，影响着全世界无数人的生命。 但希望在黑暗中闪耀，专门的治疗项目为那些寻求康复的人提供了生命线。 在这篇文章中，我们深入研究酒精成瘾治疗的世界，探索其多方面的组成部分，并帮助个人摆脱成瘾的束缚。

踏上康复之路始于富有同情心的医疗专业人员进行的全面评估。 这一关键步骤可以衡量成瘾的严重程度，识别同时发生的心理健康问题，并制定个性化的治疗计划。 为了确保旅途安全，排毒通常是下一阶段。 在警惕的医疗监督下，身体会被温和地清除酒精，同时控制戒断症状，​​为未来的康复之旅奠定坚实的基础。

康复计划可满足不同的需求，提供住院和门诊选择。 住院治疗为个人提供了结构化和沉浸式的环境，促进了变革。 全天候监督、强化治疗课程和支持性社区使个人能够重写自己的故事。 另外，门诊项目可以灵活地维持日常生活，同时参加预定的治疗课程和支持小组，通过外部支持系统促进康复。

在治疗领域，个体治疗课程是个人成长的强大催化剂。 善解人意的咨询师和心理学家采用循证疗法，例如认知行为疗法（CBT）、动机访谈和辩证行为疗法（DBT）。 这些方法深入研究成瘾的核心原因，解决思维模式和触发因素，并为个人提供宝贵的应对机制。 通过一对一的课程，个人获得了克服渴望、做出更健康的选择并拥抱更光明的未来的工具。

团结才能增强力量，使得团体治疗和支持在康复过程中变得非常宝贵。 小组会议为个人提供了一个与志趣相投的同伴联系的平台，培养归属感和理解感。 在培育团体环境中分享个人故事、胜利和挑战可以提供深远的治疗益处。 戒酒互诫协会 (AA) 等广受认可的计划为持续支持提供了结构化框架，激励个人以新的决心继续前进。

有效的治疗超越了心灵，包括滋养身体、心灵和精神的整体方法。 正念和冥想练习、瑜伽、艺术治疗、锻炼和营养指导创建了一个强大的支持系统。 这些补充干预措施可以促进自我保健、减轻压力和整体健康，从而加速康复过程。 通过采用整体模式，个人可以增强韧性，找到安慰，并点燃内心治愈的火花。

康复是一项终生的承诺，善后护理是长期清醒的重要支柱。 治疗计划优先考虑复发预防策略、出院计划和获得支持网络。 积极参与支持小组、门诊咨询以及定期与医疗保健专业人员进行检查可确保持续的指导并增强复原力。 通过利用善后护理资源，个人可以坚定自己的决心，在与旧病复发的斗争中保持领先一步。

结论

在酒精成瘾的阴影中，有一盏希望的灯塔。 通过包括个体化治疗、团体支持、整体方法和善后护理在内的专门治疗计划，个人可以踏上通往持久康复的变革之旅。 这条道路可能充满挑战，但凭借专业人士的帮助和坚定不移的决心，更光明、无酒精的未来是指日可待的。



原文:

## Introduction
Alcohol addiction is a relentless foe that affects countless lives worldwide. But hope shines through the darkness, as specialized treatment programs offer a lifeline for those seeking recovery. In this article, we delve into the world of alcohol addiction treatment, exploring its multifaceted components and empowering individuals to break free from the chains of addiction.

1. Initial Assessment and Detoxification

Embarking on the path to recovery starts with a thorough assessment conducted by compassionate medical professionals. This crucial step gauges the severity of addiction, identifies co-occurring mental health concerns, and tailors a personalized treatment plan. To ensure a safe journey, detoxification is often the next phase. Under vigilant medical supervision, the body is gently purged of alcohol while managing withdrawal symptoms, laying a solid foundation for the recovery journey ahead.

2. Inpatient or Outpatient Rehabilitation

Rehab programs cater to diverse needs, offering both inpatient and outpatient options. Inpatient treatment provides individuals with a structured and immersive environment, fostering transformative change. Around-the-clock supervision, intensive therapy sessions, and a supportive community empower individuals to rewrite their stories. Alternatively, outpatient programs grant flexibility to maintain daily routines while attending scheduled therapy sessions and support groups, bolstering recovery with external support systems.

3. Individualized Therapy

Within the treatment landscape, individual therapy sessions serve as powerful catalysts for personal growth. Empathetic counselors and psychologists employ evidence-based modalities, such as cognitive-behavioral therapy (CBT), motivational interviewing, and dialectical behavior therapy (DBT). These approaches delve into the core causes of addiction, addressing thought patterns, and triggers, and equipping individuals with invaluable coping mechanisms. Through one-on-one sessions, individuals gain the tools to conquer cravings, make healthier choices, and embrace a brighter future.

4. Group Support and Peer Interaction

Strength thrives in unity, making group therapy and support invaluable in the recovery process. Group sessions provide individuals with a platform to connect with like-minded peers, fostering a sense of belonging and understanding. Sharing personal stories, triumphs, and challenges within a nurturing group environment offers profound therapeutic benefits. Widely recognized programs like Alcoholics Anonymous (AA) provide a structured framework for continued support, inspiring individuals to forge ahead with newfound determination.

5. Holistic Approaches

Effective treatment goes beyond the mind, encompassing holistic approaches to nurture the body, mind, and spirit. Mindfulness and meditation practices, yoga, art therapy, exercise, and nutritional guidance create a robust support system. These complementary interventions foster self-care, stress reduction, and overall well-being, amplifying the recovery process. By embracing holistic modalities, individuals build resilience, find solace, and ignite a spark of inner healing.

6. Aftercare and Relapse Prevention

Recovery is a lifelong commitment, and aftercare forms an essential pillar of long-term sobriety. Treatment programs prioritize relapse prevention strategies, discharge planning, and access to support networks. Active participation in support groups, outpatient counseling, and regular check-ins with healthcare professionals ensure ongoing guidance and reinforce resilience. By embracing aftercare resources, individuals fortify their resolve, staying one step ahead in the battle against relapse.

Conclusion

Amidst the shadows of alcohol addiction, there is a beacon of hope. With specialized treatment programs encompassing individualized therapy, group support, holistic approaches, and aftercare, individuals can embark on a transformative journey toward lasting recovery. The path may be challenging, but with professional help and unwavering determination, a brighter, alcohol-free future is within reach.
item.author: michael01987329

item.title: 将 AI 融入您的 React 应用程序 | Incorporating AI Into Your React App
item.description:
如果你是一名程序员，你肯定知道 React。 您很可能知道如何使用 React 创建 Web 应用程序。 你可以用 React 创建无穷无尽的东西。 随着这个新时代的到来，我们有了一个新朋友，称为 AI（人工智能）。 现在，如果我们创建一个 React 应用程序，然后将 AI 融入其中会怎样？ 今天这个博客将介绍如何做到这一点。

首先，它并不像人们想象的那么困难。 今天我们将使用 Alan AI 来帮助我们创建一个带有 AI 的 React 应用程序。 这将是一个简单的支持语音的 React 应用程序。 用户将能够单击语音助手按钮并发出命令，作为回报，艾伦人工智能将回复他们。

步骤1.进入Alan AI Studio ( alan.app/ )。 然后注册并在 Alan AI 中创建一个项目。

步骤 2. 现在是时候创建一个简单的 React 应用程序了。

  1. 转到您要在其中创建应用程序的文件夹。
    npx create-react-app my-app

  2. 切换到该文件夹
    cd my-app

步骤 3. 安装 Alan AI Web 组件。 幸运的是，在当今时代，我们不必从头开始创建人工智能。
npm i @alan-ai/alan-sdk-web

步骤 4. 是时候将 Alan AI 按钮添加到应用程序中了

您需要将 YOUR_KEY_FROM_ALAN_STUDIO_HERE 替换为特殊的 Alan AI SDK 密钥。 在 Alan AI studio 中，代码编辑器顶部单击集成，然后复制 Alan SDK key 字段中提供的值，然后将该值粘贴到代码中的“key”。

步骤 5. 最后是添加语音命令的时候了。

 intent(`What is your name?`, p => { p.play(`It's Alan, and yours?`); }); intent(`How are you doing?`, p => { p.play(`Good, thank you. What about you?`); });

现在，在您的 React 应用程序中，您将可以询问“您叫什么名字？” 和“你好吗？”

因为我们有有用的库和框架，所以将 AI 合并到您的 React 应用程序中并不太复杂。 这只是一个框架。 这里还有一些框架和库，因此您可以自己创建 AI React 应用程序。 在这篇博客中，我们介绍了整合人工智能的一种非常基本的方法。 后端和前端开发的结合会变得更加困难。 这只是一种简单有趣的让你的双脚湿漉漉的方式。

我一直觉得 AI 非常有趣，事实上现在可以创建一个令人惊叹的 AI React 应用程序。 正如我之前提到的，这是整合人工智能的一种非常基本的方法，尽管它非常简洁。 作为一名仍在学校的开发人员，我喜欢遇到新的挑战和障碍。 有了这些新信息，我发现还有什么比博客更好的分享方式呢？ 现在去创建一个 AI React 应用程序吧！

资源- ( alan.app/ )



原文:

If you are a programmer you definitely know about React. You most likely know how to use React to create a web application. There are endless things you can create with React. Well with this new day and age we have a new friend called AI (Artificial Intelligence). Now what if we created a React application and then incorporated AI into it. Today this blog will be covering how to do so.

First things first it is not as difficult as one would expect. Today we will be using Alan AI to help us create a React app with AI. This will be a simple voice enabled React app. Users will be able to click the voice assistant button and give commands and in return Alan AI will reply to them.

Step 1. Go to Alan AI Studio (alan.app/). Then sign up and in Alan AI create a project.

Step 2. Now it is time to create a simple React app.

  1. Go to the folder where you would like to create the app.
    npx create-react-app my-app

  2. Switch to that folder
    cd my-app

3.Now just start it up
npm start

Step 3. Install the Alan AI Web component. Luckily with this day and age we don't have to create an AI from scratch.
npm i @alan-ai/alan-sdk-web

Step 4. Its time to add the Alan AI button to the app

1.Open your App.js file

2.Import the Alan AI Web component
import alanBtn from "@alan-ai/alan-sdk-web";

3.Use the Effect Hook to add the Alan AI button.
import React, { useEffect } from 'react';

4.Now call useEffect

function App() {
    // Adding the Alan AI button
    useEffect(() => {
        alanBtn({
            key: 'YOUR_KEY_FROM_ALAN_STUDIO_HERE',
            onCommand: (commandData) => {
                if (commandData.command === 'go:back') {
                    // Call the client code that will react to the received command
                }
            }
        });
    }, []);
}
  1. You need to replace YOUR_KEY_FROM_ALAN_STUDIO_HERE with the special Alan AI SDK key. In Alan AI studio at the top of the code editor click Integrations, then copy the value provided in the Alan SDK key field then paste the value to "key" in the code.

Step 5. Finally its time to add voice commands.

intent(`What is your name?`, p => {
    p.play(`It's Alan, and yours?`);
});

intent(`How are you doing?`, p => {
    p.play(`Good, thank you. What about you?`);
});

Now in your react app you will be able to ask "What is your name?" and "How are you doing?"

See since we have helpful libraries and frameworks it is not too complicated to incorporate AI into your react app. This is just one framework. Here are a couple more frameworks and libraries so you can go and create an AI react app on your own. TensorFlow.js, Brain.js, OpenCV.js, IBM Watson Developer Cloud, ML5.js, Microsoft Cognitive Services. In this blog we went over a very basic way to incorporate AI. It gets much more difficult with a combination of backend and frontend development. This is just an easy fun way to get your feet wet.

I have always found AI very interesting, the fact that it is now possible to create an AI React app to amazing. As I mentioned before this is a very elementary way to incorporate AI although it is very neat. As a developer that is still in school I love coming across new challenges and obstacles. With this new information I learned I thought what better way to share it than with a blog. Now go and create an AI React app!!!

Resources- (alan.app/)
item.author: sebby235

item.title: 使用 Solidity 进行 dApp 开发有哪些优势？ | What are the advantages of using Solidity for dApp development?
item.description:
在开发去中心化应用程序 (dApp) 时，选择正确的编程语言对于确保兼容性、效率和安全性至关重要。 我们来探讨一下 dApp 开发常用的编程语言、Solidity 的优势以及选择编程语言时需要考虑的因素。

它是一种专门为以太坊平台设计的静态类型、面向合约的语言。 以太坊兼容性：Solidity 是在以太坊区块链上开发 dApp 的主要语言。 它与以太坊虚拟机（EVM）无缝集成，可以直接访问以太坊的功能、库和工具。

智能合约开发：Solidity 允许开发人员定义和执行智能合约，这是 dApp 的重要组成部分。 它提供了合约继承、修改器、事件和数据结构等功能，以创建复杂且安全的智能合约开发。

行业采用：Solidity 已获得广泛的行业采用，使得更容易找到经验丰富的 Solidity 开发人员。 熟练的专业人员的可用性确保了高效的 dApp 开发和持续的支持。

虽然 Solidity 在基于以太坊的 dApp 中很流行，但其他编程语言也可用于不同区块链平台上的 dApp 开发。 一些著名的语言包括：

它通常用于构建 Substrate 等区块链平台，并可用于在这些平台上开发 dApp。

它提供简单性、性能和并发支持，使其适合构建去中心化应用程序。

在选择 dApp 开发的编程语言时，需要考虑以下几个因素：

平台兼容性：确保所选语言与目标区块链平台及其关联的虚拟机兼容，因为不同的平台可能有特定的语言要求。

开发者社区和生态系统：评估充满活力的开发者社区以及支持工具、库和框架的可用性。 这有助于获取资源、寻求帮助和利用现有解决方案。

安全注意事项：考虑语言的安全功能和编写安全代码的最佳实践。 特定于该语言的审核和测试工具可以帮助识别和减轻漏洞。

性能和可扩展性：评估语言的性能特征，特别是对于需要高吞吐量和可扩展性的 dApp。 提供高效资源利用并支持并行处理的语言可能是有利的。

互操作性：如果 dApp 需要与多个区块链或其他系统交互，请考虑促进互操作性的语言，并拥有支持跨链通信的库或框架。

总之，Solidity 广泛用于基于以太坊的 dApp 开发，提供与以太坊生态系统的兼容性、广泛的社区支持和强大的智能合约功能。 不过，根据区块链平台和项目需求，也可以考虑其他语言，如 JavaScript、Rust 和 Go。 在选择用于 dApp 开发的编程语言时，评估平台兼容性、开发者社区、安全功能、性能和互操作性至关重要。 Maticz, the leading dApp development service provider specializing in smart contracts and also a private blockchain development company , offers comprehensive services to cater to various dApp development needs. Maticz是领先的智能合约dApp开发服务提供商，也是一家私有区块链开发公司，提供全面的服务来满足各种dApp开发需求。



原文:

When it comes to developing decentralized applications (dApps), choosing the right programming language is crucial for ensuring compatibility, efficiency, and security. Let’s explore the programming languages commonly used for dApp development, the advantages of Solidity, and the factors to consider when selecting a programming language.

One of the widely adopted languages for dApp development is Solidity. It is a statically-typed, contract-oriented language specifically designed for the Ethereum platform. Solidity offers several benefits for dApp development:

Ethereum Compatibility: Solidity is the primary language used for developing dApps on the Ethereum blockchain. It seamlessly integrates with the Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM), enabling direct access to Ethereum’s functionalities, libraries, and tools.

Smart Contract Development: Solidity allows developers to define and execute smart contracts, which are essential components of dApps. It provides features like contract inheritance, modifiers, events, and data structures to create complex and secure Smart Contract Development.

Industry Adoption: Solidity has gained significant industry adoption, making it easier to find experienced Solidity developers. This availability of skilled professionals ensures efficient dApp development and ongoing support.

While Solidity is popular for Ethereum-based dApps, other programming languages can be used for dApp development on different blockchain platforms. Some notable languages include:

– JavaScript: JavaScript is a widely-used programming language for web development and is often used in combination with frameworks like Node.js and React to build frontend interfaces for dApps.

– Rust: Rust is a systems programming language that offers memory safety, concurrency, and high performance. It is commonly used for building blockchain platforms like Substrate and can be utilized for developing dApps on those platforms.

– Go: Go is another language that has gained popularity in blockchain development. It provides simplicity, performance, and support for concurrency, making it suitable for building decentralized applications.

When choosing a programming language for dApp development, several factors need to be considered:

Platform Compatibility: Ensure that the chosen language is compatible with the targeted blockchain platform and its associated virtual machine, as different platforms may have specific language requirements.

Developer Community and Ecosystem: Evaluate the availability of a vibrant developer community and supporting tools, libraries, and frameworks. This helps in accessing resources, seeking assistance, and leveraging existing solutions.

Security Considerations: Consider the language’s security features and best practices for writing secure code. Auditing and testing tools specific to the language can aid in identifying and mitigating vulnerabilities.

Performance and Scalability: Assess the language’s performance characteristics, especially for dApps that require high throughput and scalability. Languages that offer efficient resource utilization and support parallel processing can be advantageous.

Interoperability: If the dApp needs to interact with multiple blockchains or other systems, consider languages that facilitate interoperability and have libraries or frameworks supporting cross-chain communication.

In conclusion, Solidity is widely used for Ethereum-based dApp development, providing compatibility with the Ethereum ecosystem, extensive community support, and robust smart contract capabilities. However, depending on the blockchain platform and project requirements, other languages like JavaScript, Rust, and Go can also be considered. When selecting a programming language for dApp development, it is crucial to evaluate platform compatibility, developer community, security features, performance, and interoperability. Maticz, the leading dApp development service provider specializing in smart contracts and also a private blockchain development company, offers comprehensive services to cater to various dApp development needs.
item.author: cooper_91

item.title: 如何在 NavLink 上为多个反应路线设置活动类 | How to set active class on NavLink for multiple react routes
item.description:
基兰·曼萨

发布于 7 月 5 日

我最近遇到了一个突出显示多条路线的导航链接的用例。

假设我们有两条路线

  1. 客户列表（/客户）。
  2. 客户详细信息 (/customer-details/:customerId)。

现在我有一个像这样的导航链接

<NavLink to={PATHS.CUSTOMERS}>Customers</Navlink>

该用例适用于两条路线，导航链路应处于活动状态。 这是我实现的逻辑：

 import { NavLink, matchPath, useLocation } from "react-router-dom"; export function NavigationBar() { const { pathname } = useLocation(); const setNavlinkClasses = (paths: string[]) => paths.some((path) => matchPath(path, pathname)) ? "navlink active" : "navlink"; return ( <nav> <NavLink to={PATHS.CUSTOMERS} className={setNavlinkClasses([PATHS.CUSTOMERS, PATHS.CUSTOMER_DETAILS])} >Customers</NavLink> </nav> ); }

就是这样。

希望有帮助😄
基兰👋👋

阿卜杜拉·穆宾 - 6 月 11 日

一旦被暂停，kiranmantha 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到其暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，kiranmantha 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，kiranmantha 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己才能访问。

如果 kiranmantha 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从仪表板重新发布帖子。

笔记：

感谢您保证 DEV 社区的安全。 您可以执行以下操作来标记 kiranmantha：

使 kiranmantha 的所有帖子不那么明显

举报其他不当行为

坚持不懈的 kiranmantha 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Kiran Mantha

Posted on Jul 5

I recently got into one use case of highlighting the navlink for multiple routes.

Lets say we have two routes

  1. customer listing (/customers).
  2. customer details (/customer-details/:customerId).

The entry point in ui is customer listing and when you click on any record, we will be navigated to customer details page.

Now i have a navlink like this

<NavLink to={PATHS.CUSTOMERS}>Customers</Navlink>

The use case is for both the routes, the navlink should be in active state. And this is the logic i implemented:

import { NavLink, matchPath, useLocation } from "react-router-dom"; export function NavigationBar() { const { pathname } = useLocation(); const setNavlinkClasses = (paths: string[]) => paths.some((path) => matchPath(path, pathname)) ? "navlink active" : "navlink"; return ( <nav> <NavLink to={PATHS.CUSTOMERS} className={setNavlinkClasses([PATHS.CUSTOMERS, PATHS.CUSTOMER_DETAILS])} >Customers</NavLink>
 </nav>
 );
}

And that's it.

Hope it helps 😄
Kiran 👋 👋

Abdullah al Mubin - Jun 11
